MonoBehaviour_0 (id: 123183794) on Mesh_TrafficLight uses script guid 50410efda0128f248aadbf8266a903cb (TrafficLights). Fields are bound as: Red -> fileID 8569639267829841366 (prefab light), Green -> fileID 2097357867, Yellow -> fileID 888664352. No m_Calls UnityEvents are defined. The Start() coroutine auto-executes on scene load to cycle lights: Green 30s, Yellow 5s, Red 30s with Debug.Log("on") before Yellow and Red. This Trigger step provides an observation window to cover the automatic sequence; no manual methods are available.

We need to simulate collecting stars so that Scoremanager.changescore(int) is invoked until score == winAmount (2) to trigger winlosescript.Winlevel(). However, ScoreManager has no Collider/Rigidbody/EventTrigger and changescore requires an int parameter, so it cannot be called via the allowed Trigger action. Please provide the interactable star objects (or a parameterless wrapper on ScoreManager, e.g., AddStar() calling changescore(StarValue)), or any UnityEvent m_Calls wiring that invokes changescore.
